title: German Cherry Flatbread
description: A sweet and savory vegetarian flatbread topped with cherry compote, crispy onions, and a sprinkle of German cheese.

ingredients.name: German cheese (such as Emmental or Gouda)

instructions: Roll out the flatbread and place on a baking sheet.
Spread the cherry jam evenly over the flatbread, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Top with crispy onions, German cheese, and fresh thyme.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the flatbread is crispy.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
